title: gastrolychnis kingii
intro: Gastrolychnis kingii, also known as King's crown or King's flower, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gastrolychnis kingii include reducing fever, alleviating cough, and treating digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Gastrolychnis kingii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
